title: tectaria heterocarpa
intro: Tectaria heterocarpa, also known as the Polynesian shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae, characterized by its unique shield-shaped fronds. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Polynesian medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tectaria heterocarpa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially lowering blood pressure, making it a valuable component of traditional medicine. Tinctures, infusions, and decoctions are among the herbal preparations used to harness the medicinal properties of Tectaria heterocarpa.
